gaps.description: DBB-008: IOError is defined but backends catch raw I/O failures and return null rather than throwing IOError instances
scan() returns {path, line, content} with 1-based line on all backends
list() returns paths with leading slash on all backends
NotFoundError, PermissionDeniedError, IOError typed error classes implemented and exported
OPFS walkDir errors logged via console.error and re-thrown
Empty path validation on AgenticStoreBackend, NodeFsBackend, MemoryStorage, LocalStorageBackend
README has backend configuration examples for all 3 backends
README has performance comparison table with all required columns (Read small/large, Write, Storage Limit, Browser Support, Best For)
README has browser support matrix with Chrome/Safari/Firefox/Edge/Node.js for all backends
ShellFS exported from index.ts with exec() supporting ls/cat/grep/find/rm/tree
MemoryStorage exported from index.ts and passes core contract
JSDoc on all AgenticFileSystem public methods and StorageBackend interface methods
batchGet and batchSet on StorageBackend interface and all backends
ls() size and mtime populated via stat() on NodeFsBackend
LocalStorageBackend exported from index.ts with full StorageBackend implementation
TfIdfEmbedBackend exported from index.ts implementing EmbedBackend
tree() method on AgenticFileSystem returns nested TreeNode structure
Permission system enforces read/write per path with prefix matching
scanStream() on all backends yields results incrementally
SQLiteBackend exported from index.ts with full StorageBackend implementation
NodeFsBackend symlink support with circular detection
stat() on NodeFsBackend, OPFSBackend, AgenticStoreBackend returns {size, mtime, isDirectory}
CHANGELOG.md covers m1-m5 milestones
file_delete and file_tree in getToolDefinitions() and executeTool()
createDefaultBackend()/createAutoBackend() exported and selects correct backend per runtime
